Hm,

according to
http://www.tolisgroup.com/products/software/bruserver/supportedclients.html
they have/had FreeBSD support but the last version mentioned is FreeBSD
6.  No information about support for current versions.

I will try to contact them about that.  If I do not get any response
from them, I will remove the entry completely after 2 weeks.


- --
